claim_short: 1506.08013 Hytönen Veraar Weis Problem 5.8 complex interpolation real interpolation type cotype Banach lattice Calderon-Lozanovskii product p-convex q-concave partial result. If [X0,X1]_theta is the Calderon product and endpoints are p-convex then (X0,X1)_{theta,p} embeds into [X0,X1]_theta; if endpoints are q-concave then [X0,X1]_theta embeds into (X0,X1)_{theta,q}. This is a lattice convexity/concavity subcase...
